_comment: Expected invariants for the `standard` fixture. The fixture's plan declares `## Complexity: standard`, which per commands/build-plan-command.md maps to: Backend Developer → Reviewer (loop) → Tester. The first Agent spawn must be the Backend Developer running on the `opus` tier (per agents/backend-developer-agent.md `## Model`). Update the corresponding line below when build-plan's flow table or the agent's model tier changes — a mismatch here is the smoke test's signal.
